Insert generated yaml here


```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE, paged.print=FALSE}
# Load packages likely to be used.
library(writer)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(stargazer)
library(DiagrammeR)
library(ggplot2)
# Set global options.
options(
  scipen=999,
  knitr.kable.NA = ''
)
writer::gen_bib()
```


# Introduction

## Background of the study

## Knowledge gap and research question

## Expectations

## Research design

## Findings

## Contributions

## Layout



# Theoretical framework

## Literature review

## Hypothesis/proposition development





# Research design

## Justification of the research design

## Data sources

## Population and sample

## Variables

## Analytical procedure





# Findings


## Descriptive statistics

### Univariate statistics

### Bivariate statistics


## Inferential statistics


## Additional analyses

### Complementary evidences

### Alternative explanations


## Robustness tests

### Alternative samples

### Alternative operationalizations

### Alternative model specifications






# Discussion and conclusion

## Summary

## Interpretation of observations

## Contributions

## Limitations

## Avenues for further research
